markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Deep dive into Biologica's perimenopause product formulation, positioning, and content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Biologica uses premium, clinically-studied ingredients tailored to specific hormonal stages, focusing on bioavailability and efficacy](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Product differentiators: effervescent form factor, sophisticated flavor profile, no sugar, high bioavailability](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Content strategy should focus on educating about hormonal stages, normalizing experiences, and positioning Biologica as a "co-pilot" for hormones](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3340.0)
  - [Brand imagery will feature high-end black and white photography, balancing luxury look with accessible pricing](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)

## Topics

### Product Formulation

  - [5-6 trademarked ingredients per formula, tailored to each hormonal stage](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Focus on bioavailable vitamins and minerals for optimal absorption](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)
  - [Clinically-studied probiotic included in each product](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=384.0)
  - [Formulated without sugar, using natural flavors for a sophisticated taste profile](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Competitive Differentiators

  - [Effervescent form factor for increased bioavailability and enjoyable consumption](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)
  - [Curated approach vs. "kitchen sink" formulations of competitors](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=640.0)
  - [Addresses psycho-social-emotional symptoms (focus, mood, sleep) rather than just physical symptoms](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [No sugar, but maintains a pleasant sweetness profile](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1435.0)
  - [Ability to include critical ingredients like iron, which are difficult to formulate in gummies](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)

### Target Audience and Positioning

  - [Women with household incomes over $100,000](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=271.0)
  - [Positioning as a "co-pilot" for hormones, normalizing the experience rather than treating it as an imbalance](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3348.0)
  - [Sophisticated flavor profiles (e.g., Passion Fruit Blackcurrant, Elderflower Lemonade) aligned with target consumer preferences](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1814.0)

### Content Strategy Insights

  - [Educate on the five hormonal life stages and their impacts](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Address common perimenopause symptoms: dulled mental acuity, irritability, mood swings, anxiety, sleep issues](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
  - [Highlight the multi-generational aspect, sharing wisdom from older women to younger generations](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3340.0)
  - [Focus on transparency in ingredient sourcing and testing, without overemphasizing provenance](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2708.0)

### Brand Imagery

  - [High-end black and white photography shot on real film](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)
  - [Balancing luxury aesthetic with accessible pricing (comparable to H\&M's visual approach)](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3689.0)
  - [Mix of hero lifestyle shoots and potentially more budget-friendly content imagery](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3660.0)

### Manufacturing and Quality

  - [Adherence to Good Manufacturing Practices (GMP)](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Focus on bioavailability, meeting clinical dosages, and purity testing](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Non-GMO ingredients](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Third-party testing for purity and potency](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1529.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Maggie to provide GMP explanation document](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1609.0)
  - [Brian to share updated web design system and shot list for the website](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3545.0)
  - [Discuss visual content strategy, including ingredient imagery and illustrations, in next week's meeting](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=3570.0)
  - [GrowthX team to begin developing content ideas based on insights from this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/KFAPVstRz6z5jp-_Yf-dkz9CJ1Zy-VKJ?tab=summary&timestamp=2921.0)
